title: WASSCE Introduction to Mobile Phones and Service Providers
short_description: Comprehensive practice for WASSCE candidates covering mobile phone basics, GSM terminologies, and service providers.
description:
### Unit: INTRODUCTION TO MOBILE PHONES AND SERVICE PROVIDERS

**Subject:** Computer Hardware and GSM Repairs 1 | **Level:** Senior Secondary (WASSCE)

This module covers the foundational aspects of mobile communication, including hardware types, technical terminologies, and the telecommunications landscape in Nigeria.

**Key Topics:**
* **Acronyms & Terminologies:** GSM, SIM, PUK, IMEI, PIN, CDMA, SMS, MMS.
* **Mobile Bands:** Understanding 900MHz, 1800MHz, and 1900MHz frequencies.
* **Types of Phones:** Identification of Bar, slider, flip/clamshell, and modern smartphones (Android/iOS).
* **Phone Accessories:** Chargers, power banks, earpieces, Bluetooth devices, and OTG cables.
* **Service Providers:** Major Nigerian telecom providers (MTN, Airtel, Glo, 9Mobile) and essential USSD codes for balance and IMEI checking (*#06#).
seo_title: WASSCE GSM Introduction to Mobile Phones and Service Providers
seo_description: Practice WASSCE Computer Hardware and GSM Repairs online. Master mobile phone types, GSM terminologies, and USSD codes for Nigeria's major telecom providers. Mock test with explanation. 35+ Practice Questions.

title: WASSCE Basic Computer and Internet Concepts
short_description: Comprehensive practice for WASSCE candidates covering basic computer and internet concepts.
description:
### Unit: BASIC COMPUTER AND INTERNET CONCEPTS

**Subject:** Computer Hardware and GSM Repairs 1 | **Level:** Senior Secondary (WASSCE)

This module covers how computers and the internet are used as essential tools to assist in mobile phone repairs and firmware management.

**Key Topics:**
* **Introduction to computer:** Basic computer operations, hardware basics, storage drives, and connecting phones to PC via USB.
* **Introduction to internet:** Understanding URLs, web browsers, IP addresses, and secure connections.
* **Browsing the web:** How to effectively search for and download mobile phone firmware (ROMs), schematic diagrams, data sheets, and repair solutions.
seo_title: WASSCE Basic Computer and Internet Concepts
seo_description: Practice WASSCE Computer Hardware and GSM Repairs online. Master basic computer and internet concepts for GSM repairs. Mock test with explanation. 25+ Practice Questions.

title: WASSCE Components of Mobile Phone
short_description: Comprehensive practice for WASSCE candidates covering components of mobile phones.
description:
### Unit: ESSENTIAL COMPONENTS OF MOBILE PHONES AND THEIR FUNCTIONS

**Subject:** Computer Hardware and GSM Repairs 1 | **Level:** Senior Secondary (WASSCE)

This module focuses heavily on identifying what makes up a mobile phone, analyzing its internal block structure and both hardware and software elements.

**Key Topics:**
* **Structure of mobile phones:** Understanding the block diagram (Power unit, Memory unit, Audio unit, and Radio frequency unit).
* **Hardware components:** Identifying elements on the PCB including Resistors, Capacitors, Diodes, Transistors, ICs, Antenna, Screen, and Battery.
* **Software components:** Understanding Operating Systems (Android/iOS), Firmware, Baseband, and system Applications.
seo_description: Practice WASSCE Computer Hardware and GSM Repairs online. Master components of mobile phones. Mock test with explanation. 40+ Practice Questions.

title: WASSCE Maintenance and Repair of Mobile Phones
short_description: Comprehensive practice for WASSCE candidates covering maintenance and repair of mobile phones.
description:
### Unit: MAINTENANCE AND REPAIR OF MOBILE PHONES

**Subject:** Computer Hardware and GSM Repairs 1 | **Level:** Senior Secondary (WASSCE)

This module covers standard workshop safety, handling repair tools, and understanding fundamental maintenance rules for preserving and fixing mobile devices.

**Key Topics:**
* **Maintenance practices:** Differentiating between preventive (cleaning) vs. corrective (replacing) maintenance.
* **Tools and equipment:** Understanding the function of the Digital Multi-meter, Soldering iron, Hot Air Rework Station, Tweezers, and Flash boxes.
* **Workshop safety:** Handling Lithium-ion batteries safely, Anti-static (ESD) precautions, and preventing solder fume inhalation.
* **Common problems:** Recognizing basic physical damage, liquid/water damage, and common software anomalies.
seo_title: WASSCE Maintenance and Repair of Mobile Phones
seo_description: Practice WASSCE Computer Hardware and GSM Repairs online. Master maintenance and repair of mobile phones. Mock test with explanation. 40+ Practice Questions.

title: WASSCE Troubleshooting of Mobile Phones
short_description: Comprehensive practice for WASSCE candidates covering troubleshooting of mobile phones.
description:
### Unit: TROUBLESHOOTING

**Subject:** Computer Hardware and GSM Repairs 1 | **Level:** Senior Secondary (WASSCE)

This module forms the core of the WAEC Practical Exam, focusing heavily on step-by-step diagnostic procedures and fault-finding logic.

**Key Topics:**
* **Basic troubleshooting:** Using Cold testing vs. Hot testing methodologies and systematic visual inspection techniques.
* **Hardware fault finding:** Diagnosing dead phones, treating short circuits, replacing broken screens, fixing faulty charging ports, addressing speaker/mic faults, and treating water damage.
* **Software fault finding:** Resolving boot-loops, flashing/reinstalling operating systems, bypassing FRP (Factory Reset Protection), network unlocking, and performing hard resets.
seo_description: Practice WASSCE Computer Hardware and GSM Repairs online. Master troubleshooting of mobile phones. Mock test with explanation. 40+ Practice Questions.

title: WASSCE Setting Up and Managing Mobile Phone Workshop
short_description: Comprehensive practice for WASSCE candidates covering setting up and managing mobile phone workshop.
description:
### Unit: SETTING UP AND MANAGING MOBILE PHONE WORKSHOP

**Subject:** Computer Hardware and GSM Repairs 1 | **Level:** Senior Secondary (WASSCE)

This module focuses on the business, entrepreneurial, and customer-service aspects necessary to successfully run a mobile phone repair enterprise.

**Key Topics:**
* **Setting up:** Choosing a strategic shop location, optimal workshop layout, and securing reliable power supply.
* **Facilities and equipment:** Identifying required workshop furniture, safety gear, lighting, and standard display structures.
* **Business Management:** Effective customer relations, calculating profit margins, managing repair costs, issuing professional invoices/receipts, and instituting 'Dead on Arrival' customer agreements to prevent liability.
seo_title: WASSCE Setting Up and Managing Mobile Phone Workshop
seo_description: Practice WASSCE Computer Hardware and GSM Repairs online. Master setting up and managing mobile phone workshop. Mock test with explanation. 30+ Practice Questions.

title: WASSCE Further Maths: Core Algebra and Logic
short_description: Comprehensive practice for WASSCE Further Mathematics covering Sets, Surds, Binary Operations, and Logic.
description:
### Unit: PURE MATHEMATICS (Core Algebra & Logic)

**Subject:** Further Mathematics | **Level:** Senior Secondary (WASSCE)

This module covers fundamental algebraic structures, logical reasoning, and basic properties of numbers that form the foundation of higher mathematics.

**Key Topics:**
* **Sets:** Venn diagrams (up to 3 sets), set notations, commutative/associative laws, disjoint sets, and universal sets.
* **Surds:** Conjugates, rationalizing denominators, and solving equations involving surds.
* **Binary Operations:** Proving closure, finding identity elements, determining inverses, and verifying commutativity and associativity.
* **Logical Reasoning:** Truth tables, syntax rules, drawing valid conclusions from statements, implications, and deductions.
* **Indices & Logarithmic Functions:** Laws of indices and logarithms, base changes, and solving exponential equations.
seo_title: WASSCE Further Maths Core Algebra and Logic Practice
seo_description: Practice WASSCE Further Mathematics online. Master sets, surds, binary operations, logic, and logarithms. Mock test with explanation. 80+ Practice Questions.

title: WASSCE Further Maths: Functions, Polynomials & Equations
short_description: Comprehensive practice for WASSCE candidates covering mathematical functions, polynomials, partial fractions, and inequalities.
description:
### Unit: FUNCTIONS, POLYNOMIALS & EQUATIONS

**Subject:** Further Mathematics | **Level:** Senior Secondary (WASSCE)

This module delves into mappings, inverse functions, advanced polynomial factoring, and the resolution of complex algebraic fractions.

**Key Topics:**
* **Functions:** Domain and co-domain, one-to-one mapping, finding the inverse of a function, and composite functions.
* **Polynomial Functions:** Linear, quadratic, and cubic functions/equations. Applying Factor and Remainder theorems.
* **Rational Functions:** Resolution of rational functions into partial fractions (linear denominators, repeated roots, and irreducible quadratics).
* **Inequalities:** Solving and graphing linear and quadratic inequalities.
seo_title: WASSCE Further Maths Functions, Polynomials & Equations
seo_description: Practice WASSCE Further Mathematics online. Master polynomial functions, partial fractions, and composite functions. Mock test with explanation. 50+ Practice Questions.

title: WASSCE Further Maths: Combinatorics, Sequences & Matrices
short_description: Comprehensive practice covering Permutations, Combinations, Sequences, Binomial Theorem, and Matrix Transformations.
description:
### Unit: COMBINATORICS, SEQUENCES & MATRICES

**Subject:** Further Mathematics | **Level:** Senior Secondary (WASSCE)

This module covers arrangements and selections, progression series, numerical expansions, and linear transformations using matrices.

**Key Topics:**
* **Permutation and Combinations:** Simple arrangements and selection of objects with restrictions.
* **Binomial Theorem:** Expanding (a + b)^n and estimating rational powers (e.g., estimating decimals using the binomial expansion).
* **Sequences and Series:** Linear (A.P.) and Exponential (G.P.) sequences, finite/infinite series, and recurrence series.
* **Matrices:** Determinants and inverses of 2x2 matrices.
* **Linear Transformation:** Using matrices to solve simultaneous equations and map geometric points.
seo_title: WASSCE Further Maths Combinatorics, Sequences & Matrices
seo_description: Practice WASSCE Further Mathematics online. Master permutations, AP/GP, binomial theorem, and linear matrix transformations. Mock test with explanation. 50+ Practice Questions.

title: WASSCE Further Maths: Geometry & Trigonometry
short_description: Comprehensive practice covering trigonometric ratios, multiple angles, straight lines, and conic sections.
description:
### Unit: GEOMETRY & TRIGONOMETRY

**Subject:** Further Mathematics | **Level:** Senior Secondary (WASSCE)

This module explores advanced trigonometry and analytic coordinate geometry, essential for solving high-level mathematical proofs.

**Key Topics:**
* **Trigonometry:** Trigonometric ratios and rules, proving identities, compound angles (addition formulas), multiple angles, and solving trigonometric equations.
* **Coordinate Geometry:** Equations of straight lines, gradients, parallel and perpendicular lines, midpoints, and distance between points.
* **Conic Sections:** Understanding the standard and general equations of a circle (finding center and radius) and basics of parabolas.
seo_title: WASSCE Further Maths Geometry and Trigonometry
seo_description: Practice WASSCE Further Mathematics online. Master compound angles, trigonometric identities, straight lines, and conic sections. Mock test with explanation. 40+ Practice Questions.

title: WASSCE Further Maths: Calculus (Differentiation & Integration)
short_description: Comprehensive practice for WASSCE candidates covering all rules of differentiation and integration with their physical applications.
description:
### Unit: CALCULUS (Differentiation & Integration)

**Subject:** Further Mathematics | **Level:** Senior Secondary (WASSCE)

This module focuses on the mathematics of continuous change. It is heavily tested in Paper 2 and requires mastery of limits, derivatives, and integrals.

**Key Topics:**
* **Differentiation:** Idea of limits, first principles, product and quotient rules, implicit differentiation, and differentiation of transcendental/trigonometric functions.
* **Applications of Differentiation:** Second-order derivatives, rates of change, concept of Maxima and Minima (turning points), and small changes.
* **Integration:** Solving Indefinite and Definite integrals.
* **Applications of Integration:** Finding the area under a curve and volume of a solid of revolution.
seo_title: WASSCE Further Maths Calculus Differentiation Integration
seo_description: Practice WASSCE Further Mathematics online. Master limits, product/quotient rules, maxima/minima, and definite integrals. Mock test with explanation. 60 Practice Questions.

title: WASSCE Further Maths: Statistics and Probability
short_description: Comprehensive practice for WASSCE candidates covering statistical data representation, dispersion, correlation, and probability rules.
description:
### Unit: STATISTICS AND PROBABILITY

**Subject:** Further Mathematics | **Level:** Senior Secondary (WASSCE)

This module covers the collection, analysis, interpretation, and presentation of numerical data, as well as the mathematical calculation of likelihood.

**Key Topics:**
* **Statistics Representation:** Tabulation, graphical representation (histograms, cumulative frequency/ogives).
* **Measures:** Calculating measures of location (mean, median, mode) and Measures of Dispersion (variance, standard deviation) for grouped data.
* **Correlation:** Calculating rank correlation and interpreting scatter diagrams.
* **Probability:** Meaning of probability, addition/multiplication rules, independent/mutually exclusive events, simple sample spaces, and probability distributions (e.g., Binomial distribution).
seo_title: WASSCE Further Maths Statistics and Probability Practice
seo_description: Practice WASSCE Further Mathematics online. Master graphical data, standard deviation, correlation, and probability distributions. Mock test with explanation. 40+ Practice Questions.

title: WASSCE Further Maths: Vectors and Mechanics
short_description: Comprehensive practice covering Vectors algebra, Statics (forces, equilibrium) and Dynamics (motion, projectiles).
description:
### Unit: VECTORS AND MECHANICS

**Subject:** Further Mathematics | **Level:** Senior Secondary (WASSCE)

This module applies pure mathematics to physical scenarios, analyzing forces, movement, and directional quantities.

**Key Topics:**
* **Vectors:** Scalar/vector quantities, representation, algebra of vectors, unit/position vectors, scalar (dot) product, and vector (cross) product.
* **Statics:** Resolution of coplanar forces at a point and on rigid bodies, equilibrium, determining resultants, Lami's theorem, moments of force, and calculating friction.
* **Dynamics:** Equations of motion, calculating impulse and momentum.
* **Projectiles:** Calculating maximum height, time of flight, and horizontal range of projected objects.
seo_title: WASSCE Further Maths Vectors and Mechanics Practice
seo_description: Practice WASSCE Further Mathematics online. Master dot/cross products, statics, equilibrium, friction, and projectile motion. Mock test with explanation. 50 Practice Questions.
